tasks.label: Python: Set up virtual environment
tasks.command: python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -e '.[test]' && playwright install chromium

tasks.label: HA: Start persistent server
tasks.command: source .venv/bin/activate && HA_VERSION=$(tr -d '[:space:]' < tests/HA_VERSION) HA_CONFIG_PATH=tests/ha-config HA_PLUGINS_YAML=tests/plugins.yaml python -m ha_testcontainer.ha_server

tasks.label: pytest: Visual scenarios
tasks.command: source .venv/bin/activate && if [ -f .ha_env ]; then source .ha_env; fi; pytest tests/visual/test_scenarios.py

tasks.label: pytest: Visual scenarios (Update)
tasks.command: source .venv/bin/activate && if [ -f .ha_env ]; then source .ha_env; fi; SNAPSHOT_UPDATE=1 pytest tests/visual/test_scenarios.py

tasks.label: pytest: Visual scenario - single
tasks.command: source .venv/bin/activate && if [ -f .ha_env ]; then source .ha_env; fi; pytest tests/visual/test_scenarios.py -k '${input:scenarioId}'

tasks.label: pytest: Visual scenario - single (Update)
tasks.command: source .venv/bin/activate && if [ -f .ha_env ]; then source .ha_env; fi; SNAPSHOT_UPDATE=1 pytest tests/visual/test_scenarios.py -k '${input:scenarioId}'

tasks.label: pytest: Doc images
tasks.command: source .venv/bin/activate && if [ -f .ha_env ]; then source .ha_env; fi; pytest tests/visual/test_doc_images.py

tasks.label: pytest: Doc images (Update)
tasks.command: source .venv/bin/activate && if [ -f .ha_env ]; then source .ha_env; fi; DOC_IMAGE_UPDATE=1 pytest tests/visual/test_doc_images.py

tasks.label: pytest: Doc images - single
tasks.command: source .venv/bin/activate && if [ -f .ha_env ]; then source .ha_env; fi; pytest tests/visual/test_doc_images.py -k '${input:scenarioId}'

tasks.label: pytest: Doc images - single (Update)
tasks.command: source .venv/bin/activate && if [ -f .ha_env ]; then source .ha_env; fi; DOC_IMAGE_UPDATE=1 pytest tests/visual/test_doc_images.py -k '${input:scenarioId}'

inputs.description: Scenario id or pytest -k expression (e.g. options)
